message:
fix(tui): Update keyboard shortcut documentation in HelpOverlay

Corrects two keyboard shortcut discrepancies in the help overlay to match
actual keybinding implementations:

1. Command palette: Changed `: / Ctrl+P` to `: / Ctrl+K`
   - Aligns with modern convention (VS Code, Raycast, etc.) where Ctrl+K
     opens command palette, while Ctrl+P is typically used for quick file open

2. Repeats/palindromes: Changed `R` to `Alt+R`
   - The plain `R` key was conflicting with other single-key shortcuts
   - Alt+R provides a dedicated, non-conflicting binding for this
     less-frequently-used feature

These documentation fixes ensure the help overlay accurately reflects the
keybindings users will experience when using the TUI.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
